op.XAIHI.potential.1.event.description.text: Arts Amp granted by the Auxiliary Crystal is increased by another 5%.

op.XAIHI.potential.2.event.description.text: Ultimate Stack Overflow improved: Ultimate Energy cost -10%.

op.XAIHI.potential.3.event.description.text: Combo skill Stress Testing improved: When hitting the target, the hit chains 1 time to 1 additional target nearby.

op.XAIHI.potential.5.event.description.text: Ultimate Stack Overflow improved: Amp effect is increased to 1.1 times the original.

op.XAIHI.skill.COOLDOWN_BATK.event.descr.text: An attack with up to 5 sequences that deals Cryo DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals {poise:0} Stagger.

op.XAIHI.skill.COOLDOWN_DIVE.event.descr.text: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Cryo DMG to nearby enemies.

op.XAIHI.skill.COOLDOWN_FINISHER.event.d.text: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher that deals massive Cryo DMG and recovers some SP.

op.XAIHI.skill.DISTRIBUTED_DOS.event.des.text: Summons an Auxiliary Crystal that orbits the controlled operator for a while. After the controlled operator performs a Final Strike on the enemy, the Auxiliary Crystal will restore the said operator's HP. This effect can trigger 2 times. The attribute of Will increases the amount of HP treatment. When the controlled operator is already at Max HP when triggering the HP restoration, grant the said operator a temporary Arts Amp as well. This effect cannot stack.

op.XAIHI.skill.STACK_OVERFLOW.event.desc.text: Applies temporary Cryo Amp and Nature Amp to the entire team. The attribute of Intellect increases the Amp effect.

op.XAIHI.skill.STRESS_TESTING.event.desc.text: When the Auxiliary Crystal uses up its HP treatments. Quickly charges up the Auxiliary Crystal and launches it at the enemy to deal Cryo DMG and Cryo Infliction.

op.XAIHI.status.AUXILIARY_CRYSTAL.event..text: Summons an Auxiliary Crystal that orbits the controlled operator for a while. After the controlled operator performs a Final Strike on the enemy, the Auxiliary Crystal will restore the said operator's HP. This effect can trigger 2 times. The attribute of Will increases the amount of HP treatment. When the controlled operator is already at Max HP when triggering the HP restoration, grant the said operator a temporary Arts Amp as well. This effect cannot stack.

op.XAIHI.status.DISTRIBUTED_DOS_AMP.even.text: When the controlled operator is already at Max HP when triggering the Auxiliary Crystal HP restoration, grants a temporary Arts Amp.

op.XAIHI.status.EXECUTE_PROCESS.event.de.text: Cryo DMG Taken debuff (Cryo Fragility) applied by Stress Testing.

op.XAIHI.talent.EXECUTE_PROCESS_TALENT.e.text: Combo skill Stress Testing improved: Hitting an enemy with Cryo Infliction or Solidification also causes the enemy to suffer Cryo DMG Taken +10% for 5s. This effect cannot stack.

op.XAIHI.talent.FREEZE_PROTOCOL_TALENT.e.text: Ultimate Stack Overflow improved: The ultimate also dispels Cryo Infliction and Solidification from the entire team.
